plugins.prepareCmd: npm version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --allow-same-version && pnpm --filter "./packages/agents/*" exec npm version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --allow-same-version
plugins.publishCmd: npm publish --access public && pnpm --filter "./packages/agents/*" publish --access public --no-git-checks
